panels.description: Estimated energy routing from sources (Solar / Battery discharge / Grid import) to uses (Home / Battery charge / Grid export) over the selected range. Set the time picker to a single day for a per-day flow. Links are modeled, not measured — see the query comment. Rendered with Apache ECharts (volkovlabs-echarts-panel).

targets.query:
import "timezone"
option location = timezone.location(name: "Europe/Amsterdam")

// AlphaESS only reports aggregate power per sample, not which source fed which
// sink. These links are ESTIMATED with a physical priority model applied at
// each sample, then integrated to kWh over the selected range:
//   Solar serves Home first, then charges Battery, then exports to Grid.
//   Home shortfall is covered by Battery first, then Grid import.
// Left/right totals still balance exactly; only the crossing links are inferred.
base = from(bucket: "alphaess")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "power_readings")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "pv_power_w" or r._field == "load_power_w" or r._field == "battery_power_w" or r._field == "grid_power_w")
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with pv: if exists r.pv_power_w then r.pv_power_w else 0.0, load: if exists r.load_power_w then r.load_power_w else 0.0, bat: if exists r.battery_power_w then r.battery_power_w else 0.0, grid: if exists r.grid_power_w then r.grid_power_w else 0.0 }))
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with bdis: if r.bat > 0.0 then r.bat else 0.0, bchg: if r.bat < 0.0 then -r.bat else 0.0, gimp: if r.grid > 0.0 then r.grid else 0.0, gexp: if r.grid < 0.0 then -r.grid else 0.0 }))
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with solar_to_load: if r.pv < r.load then r.pv else r.load }))
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with solarRem1: r.pv - r.solar_to_load, loadRem1: r.load - r.solar_to_load }))
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with battery_to_load: if r.bdis < r.loadRem1 then r.bdis else r.loadRem1 }))
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with bdisRem1: r.bdis - r.battery_to_load, loadRem2: r.loadRem1 - r.battery_to_load }))
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with grid_to_load: if r.gimp < r.loadRem2 then r.gimp else r.loadRem2 }))
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with gimpRem1: r.gimp - r.grid_to_load }))
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with solar_to_battery: if r.solarRem1 < r.bchg then r.solarRem1 else r.bchg }))
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with solarRem2: r.solarRem1 - r.solar_to_battery, bchgRem1: r.bchg - r.solar_to_battery }))
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with grid_to_battery: if r.gimpRem1 < r.bchgRem1 then r.gimpRem1 else r.bchgRem1 }))
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with solar_to_grid: if r.solarRem2 < r.gexp then r.solarRem2 else r.gexp }))
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with gexpRem1: r.gexp - r.solar_to_grid }))
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with battery_to_grid: if r.bdisRem1 < r.gexpRem1 then r.bdisRem1 else r.gexpRem1 }))
  |> group(columns: ["_start", "_stop"])

sl = base |> map(fn: (r) => ({ _time: r._time, _start: r._start, _stop: r._stop, _value: r.solar_to_load }))    |> integral(unit: 1h) |> group() |> map(fn: (r) => ({ source: "Solar",       target: "Home",       value: r._value / 1000.0 }))
bl = base |> map(fn: (r) => ({ _time: r._time, _start: r._start, _stop: r._stop, _value: r.battery_to_load }))  |> integral(unit: 1h) |> group() |> map(fn: (r) => ({ source: "Battery out", target: "Home",       value: r._value / 1000.0 }))
gl = base |> map(fn: (r) => ({ _time: r._time, _start: r._start, _stop: r._stop, _value: r.grid_to_load }))     |> integral(unit: 1h) |> group() |> map(fn: (r) => ({ source: "Grid in",     target: "Home",       value: r._value / 1000.0 }))
sb = base |> map(fn: (r) => ({ _time: r._time, _start: r._start, _stop: r._stop, _value: r.solar_to_battery })) |> integral(unit: 1h) |> group() |> map(fn: (r) => ({ source: "Solar",       target: "Battery in", value: r._value / 1000.0 }))
gb = base |> map(fn: (r) => ({ _time: r._time, _start: r._start, _stop: r._stop, _value: r.grid_to_battery }))  |> integral(unit: 1h) |> group() |> map(fn: (r) => ({ source: "Grid in",     target: "Battery in", value: r._value / 1000.0 }))
sg = base |> map(fn: (r) => ({ _time: r._time, _start: r._start, _stop: r._stop, _value: r.solar_to_grid }))    |> integral(unit: 1h) |> group() |> map(fn: (r) => ({ source: "Solar",       target: "Grid out",   value: r._value / 1000.0 }))
bg = base |> map(fn: (r) => ({ _time: r._time, _start: r._start, _stop: r._stop, _value: r.battery_to_grid }))  |> integral(unit: 1h) |> group() |> map(fn: (r) => ({ source: "Battery out", target: "Grid out",   value: r._value / 1000.0 }))

union(tables: [sl, bl, gl, sb, gb, sg, bg])
  |> group()
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.value > 0.01)
  |> yield(name: "flows")

panels.title: Energy Flow: Sources -> Uses

panels.description: Share of household load covered by own solar + battery (not imported from grid) over the selected range: (solar→load + battery→load) / total load. Modeled from the same priority allocation as the flow above.

targets.query:
base = from(bucket: "alphaess")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "power_readings")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "pv_power_w" or r._field == "load_power_w" or r._field == "battery_power_w" or r._field == "grid_power_w")
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with pv: if exists r.pv_power_w then r.pv_power_w else 0.0, load: if exists r.load_power_w then r.load_power_w else 0.0, bat: if exists r.battery_power_w then r.battery_power_w else 0.0 }))
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with bdis: if r.bat > 0.0 then r.bat else 0.0, bchg: if r.bat < 0.0 then -r.bat else 0.0 }))
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with solar_to_load: if r.pv < r.load then r.pv else r.load }))
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with solarRem1: r.pv - r.solar_to_load, loadRem1: r.load - r.solar_to_load }))
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with battery_to_load: if r.bdis < r.loadRem1 then r.bdis else r.loadRem1 }))
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with solar_to_battery: if r.solarRem1 < r.bchg then r.solarRem1 else r.bchg }))
  |> group()
  |> reduce(identity: {n: 0.0, d: 0.0}, fn: (r, accumulator) => ({ n: accumulator.n + (r.solar_to_load + r.battery_to_load), d: accumulator.d + (r.load) }))
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ _value: 100.0 * r.n / (if r.d > 0.0 then r.d else 1.0) }))
  |> yield(name: "self_sufficiency")

panels.title: Self-Sufficiency

panels.description: Share of solar generation kept on-site instead of exported: (solar→load + solar→battery) / total solar. Battery charging counts — only grid export is not self-consumed.

targets.query:
base = from(bucket: "alphaess")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "power_readings")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "pv_power_w" or r._field == "load_power_w" or r._field == "battery_power_w" or r._field == "grid_power_w")
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with pv: if exists r.pv_power_w then r.pv_power_w else 0.0, load: if exists r.load_power_w then r.load_power_w else 0.0, bat: if exists r.battery_power_w then r.battery_power_w else 0.0 }))
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with bdis: if r.bat > 0.0 then r.bat else 0.0, bchg: if r.bat < 0.0 then -r.bat else 0.0 }))
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with solar_to_load: if r.pv < r.load then r.pv else r.load }))
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with solarRem1: r.pv - r.solar_to_load, loadRem1: r.load - r.solar_to_load }))
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with battery_to_load: if r.bdis < r.loadRem1 then r.bdis else r.loadRem1 }))
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with solar_to_battery: if r.solarRem1 < r.bchg then r.solarRem1 else r.bchg }))
  |> group()
  |> reduce(identity: {n: 0.0, d: 0.0}, fn: (r, accumulator) => ({ n: accumulator.n + (r.solar_to_load + r.solar_to_battery), d: accumulator.d + (r.pv) }))
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ _value: 100.0 * r.n / (if r.d > 0.0 then r.d else 1.0) }))
  |> yield(name: "self_consumption")

panels.title: Self-Consumption
